item.title: SEC proposes Regulation Crypto in July, covering token sale exemptions, broker-dealer custody, and on-chain trading venue rules
White House presses Senate to pass CLARITY Act before August 7 recess, dividing crypto oversight between SEC and CFTC
SEC and CFTC issue joint interpretation classifying crypto tokens as digital commodities, collectibles, securities, or stablecoins
Japan reclassifies crypto as a financial asset; tax rate on crypto income to drop from 55% to a flat 20% starting 2028
UK FCA releases full crypto regulatory framework, drawing early praise but leaving significant compliance questions unresolved
EU MiCA full enforcement active from July 1; Binance exits EU market, USDT delisted from all licensed European exchanges
European Commission opens MiCA revision to expand coverage to tokenized assets and stablecoins; consultation closes September 30
MiCA Travel Rule enforced at zero-euro threshold across EEA from July 1, requiring identity data on all crypto transfers
DTCC, BlackRock, JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs complete first live tokenized stock, ETF and Treasury production trades
Goldman Sachs launches first-ever crypto ETF, a Bitcoin covered-call product targeting 15-25% annual yield
Visa stablecoin settlement platform reaches $3.5B annualized volume; U.S. bank consortium advances joint stablecoin project
Ostium DeFi protocol loses $24M in USDC after oracle manipulation exploit on Arbitrum on July 15
Wallet flaw dubbed Ill Bloom drains $5.2M from 431 wallets after attackers exploit weak recovery-phrase randomness
Kraken launches USD-settled Bitcoin and Ethereum options contracts, expanding institutional crypto derivatives access
